name: The New Normal
effect: Reframe institutional disruption as expected operating conditions. This card is considered adjusted.

clauses.name: NORMALISATION CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If this card has been in play for two turns: All previous conditions are considered legacy.

clauses.name: RESILIENCE OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If anyone names the disruption: It is renamed an opportunity.

clauses.name: MEMORY PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If anyone asks how things were before: The question is considered misaligned with current strategy.
